summary: Code verification of exec() pattern fix from iteration_13. All 3 module files now correctly use exec(PAGE_CODE, local_ctx, local_ctx). Router imports and calls are intact. Database blocker persists (PostgreSQL unavailable) preventing dynamic testing.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL not running on localhost:5432 - dynamic testing not possible

feature_1_exec_pattern_fixed_in_map_page.details: Globals parameter now receives local_ctx instead of empty dict, allowing access to st, pd, json, time, logger and all app.py functions

feature_2_exec_pattern_fixed_in_stock_pa.details: Globals parameter now receives local_ctx instead of empty dict

feature_3_exec_pattern_fixed_in_reports_.details: Globals parameter now receives local_ctx instead of empty dict

details: Imports intact: from modules.pages.{map,stock,reports}_page import run_{map,stock,reports}_page
Router pattern intact: run_*_page({**globals(), **locals()}) followed by st.stop()
Context correctly passes all globals and locals to page modules

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX CONFIRMED: All 3 modules now use exec(PAGE_CODE, local_ctx, local_ctx)
This fix ensures st, pd, json, time, logger, and all app.py functions are accessible in PAGE_CODE execution
Router remains unchanged and correctly delegates to extracted modules
action_items: BLOCKER: PostgreSQL database still not available - dynamic testing cannot be performed
Consider: Configure DATABASE_URL environment variable for remote database testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: exec() bug from iteration_13 is FIXED. All 3 page modules (map_page.py, stock_page.py, reports_page.py) now use exec(PAGE_CODE, local_ctx, local_ctx) which provides correct globals scope. Router in app.py unchanged and working. PostgreSQL database still unavailable (localhost:5432 connection refused) - this is an environment issue, not a code issue.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: exec(PAGE_CODE, {}, local_ctx) used empty {} for globals, meaning PAGE_CODE had no access to imported modules (st, pd, json, etc.) or app.py functions. Fix: Using local_ctx for both globals and locals provides full namespace access.
